text.title: Risk Management Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Weekly 15-min review trace
example.note: 8 risks open. Vendor delay risk: P=H, I=M, trigger='delivery slip > 5 days' fired Monday → converted to Issue I-12; removed from register. New risk added: API rate-limit change (source: vendor email 2026-05-15) — P=M, I=H, owner=Backend Lead, trigger='429 rate >0.5%', strategy=Mitigate.
